purpose: Define source-safe preview validation for notification outbox events and manual fallback flows without sending email, WhatsApp, push, Make or HR writes.
recipientRules: Recipient must be represented by recipientRef and role, not raw phone or raw email in Phase A preview.
Shopper notifications must not expose other shoppers, bank data, identity documents, NDA data, raw communications or private attachments.
Admin/Ops/Finance notifications may include safe operational references only.
Client notifications must be read-only summaries without internal audit details unless explicitly configured later.
templateRules: Every notification must use templateId and templateVersion.
Template variables must be limited to safe operational values and opaque refs.
No raw email bodies, raw WhatsApp bodies, raw phone, raw address, bank data, identity document, NDA or raw attachment data in preview payloads.
Spanish visible copy must be honest: prepared, preview, pending backend, requires review, conflict or manual action; not sent/synchronized unless externally confirmed later.
channelRules: email_draft creates draft/preview copy only; no email provider send.
whatsapp_web_fallback provides copy/manual action only; no WhatsApp API send.
manual_task creates a task-like preview for user action; no provider call.
in_app is preview-only until runtime is authorized.
provider_pending_configuration means the provider is not connected yet.
sent_external_confirmed_manual requires explicit user confirmation, not automatic provider proof.
claudePrototypeImpact: Toasts and notification UI must not say email/WhatsApp/Make sent while providers are off.
Use draft, copy, manual fallback, pending backend, provider not configured or manual confirmation states.
Show in-app notification preview separately from external sending.
Notification templates must be project/tenant configurable and honest.
Academia must explain notification states, manual fallback and provider gates by role.

newLessons: Why a draft is not sent
Which data must never be included in notifications
How notification templates are configured by project
interactiveChecklists: Before including payment or private data in a notification

hardStops: Do not send email from this preview.
Do not send WhatsApp from this preview.
Do not send push from this preview.
Do not call Make from this preview.
Do not write HR from this preview.
Do not write Firestore from this preview.
Do not process raw sensitive fields.
Do not mark sent unless manual external confirmation exists.
